title: verbascum caesareum
intro: Verbascum caesareum, also known as Caesar's crown, is a perennial plant that belongs to the figwort family, characterized by its tall, stately spikes of yellow or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum caesareum include soothing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its antiseptic properties also make it useful in wound healing and skin conditions like eczema. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, infusion, or poultice, and its dried leaves and roots can be used to make herbal remedies for a range of health complaints.
